title: Old Mac Logo No Dot
prompt: Edit the provided retro Macintosh-style computer logo image. Preserve the exact overall composition, centered crop, warm off-white plastic computer body, rounded screen bezel, vent lines, disk slot, soft shadows, white background, and polished icon style. Remove the central black circular dot from the screen completely. Fill the removed dot area with matching warm CRT screen glass, subtle yellow-green glow, gentle curvature, and the same smooth texture as the surrounding screen. Do not add any text, letters, numbers, symbols, logos, UI labels, watermarks, code snippets, or extra decorative elements. Keep it clean, minimal, retro, and suitable as a portfolio hero/logo mark.
